statement: In every magma, Equation 2996 (`x = ((y * (z * y)) * y) * z`) implies Equation 1199 (`x = y * ((z * (w * x)) * z)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0034
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op y (op z y)) y) z)) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op (op z (op w x)) z))
